2. Set Variable on deployer

3. MITIGATION:

4. RE-VALIDATE 
# gt ${RNODE} "ccc get remote_ports ${PORT} -f " ====> remort port will not exist
# gt ${RNODE} "ccc get  security_group ${SG1} -f| grep ${PORT}"
